name: @elek.io/core
description: Handles core functionality of elek.io projects like file IO, version control, parsing and building.
author: Nils Kolvenbach <info@nils-kolvenbach.de>

scripts.test: NODE_ENV=test yarn nyc --reporter=text ts-mocha --full-trace -p tsconfig.json test/**/*.ts
scripts.test:ci: NODE_ENV=test yarn nyc --reporter=lcov ts-mocha --full-trace -p tsconfig.json test/**/*.ts
scripts.test:full: echo "Running tests for version $npm_package_version..." && yarn build && yarn lint && yarn test
scripts.test:full:ci: echo "Running tests for version $npm_package_version..." && yarn build && yarn lint && yarn test:ci
scripts.postversion: git push --tags && yarn publish . --tag $npm_package_version && git push && echo "Successfully released version $npm_package_version!"
